case_title: BMW OF SAN FRANCISCO VS GREENWELL, CHRISTOPHER

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BMW OF SAN FRANCISCO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GREENWELL, CHRISTOPHER $911.15 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $986.15 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

BENCH LETTER REISSUED TO ANOTHER DATE FOR DEFT TO BE SERVED ON A NEW ADDRESS.
